title: SimmExceptionApplicableEnum
description: Values to specify the SIMM normalized exception approaches.

oneOf.title: FallBackToMandatoryMethod
oneOf.description: The ISDA Standard Initial Margin Model exception is applicable as a Fallback to Mandatory Method.

oneOf.title: MandatoryMethod
oneOf.description: The ISDA Standard Initial Margin Model exception is applicable as a Mandatory Method.

oneOf.title: OtherMethod
oneOf.description: An alternative approach is described in the document.
